name: DYNEX CAPITAL INC
summary: Dynex Capital, Inc. is an internally managed real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests primarily in Agency residential and commercial mortgage-backed securities (RMBS and CMBS) guaranteed by U.S. government-sponsored enterprises. The company employs leverage via repurchase agreements to enhance returns, actively manages interest rate, prepayment, spread, liquidity, and counterparty risks, and distributes at least 90% of taxable income to qualify as a REIT. Common stock trades on NYSE under ticker DX.

products.name: Agency RMBS
products.description: Fixed-rate Agency-issued pass-through residential mortgage-backed securities collateralized by pools of single-family mortgage loans.

products.name: Agency CMBS
products.description: Fixed-rate Agency-issued commercial mortgage-backed securities backed by multifamily housing loans.

products.name: CMBS IO
products.description: Interest-only securities from CMBS securitizations representing rights to receive monthly interest payments on commercial mortgage loan pools.

products.name: TBA Securities
products.description: Forward contracts for purchase or sale of fixed-rate Agency MBS used for investing and economically hedging book value exposure.
